flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Siena College rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($21.5k → $25.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Siena College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($41.0k → $46.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Siena College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
